/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/Fex.dir/Fex_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fex.dir/src/CustomApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fex.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fex.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Fex.dir/Fex_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o Fex  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
